{{Quote|As an envoy, you talked my Lord Father into joining the ranks of the Republic...|Valenthyne Farfalla meditates on the corpse of Pernicar|<ref name="Jedi vs. Sith 4">[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]]</ref>}}
The '''father''' of [[Valenthyne Farfalla]], was the leader of the [[half-Bothan]] people. [[Pernicar]] persuaded him to join the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] some years prior to the [[Ruusan campaign|Battles of Ruusan]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi vs. Sith 4|''Jedi vs. Sith'' 4]] {{1stm}}
